name: Fabrica
description: Plugin-raiz da Fabrica de Software. FSM, intake, dispatch, QA, security.

projectExecution.description: Plugin-level: parallel (each project independent) or sequential (one project at a time)

notifications.description: Per-event-type notification toggles. All default to true — set to false to suppress.

work_heartbeat.description: Token-free interval-based heartbeat service. Runs health checks + queue dispatch automatically.

maxPickupsPerTick.description: Max worker dispatches per agent per tick.
